seed_pages.content:
---
title: Anneke Veldenmere
type: person
aliases: [anneke]
summary: Founder of Marblepond Labs.
---

Anneke Veldenmere is the founder of Marblepond Labs. Anneke pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Anneke Ashgrove
type: person
aliases: [anneke]
summary: Founder of Honeyspire Works.
---

Anneke Ashgrove is the founder of Honeyspire Works. Anneke shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

turns.text: Ping Anneke about the offsite agenda.
Sorry — I meant Anneke Veldenmere, the Marblepond Labs founder.
